gradients.allowed: Use strictly translucent radial gradients for subtle glow effects behind key numbers, e.g., bg-red-500/10 with blur.

lottery_balls.main_1_49: w-12 h-12 rounded-full border border-zinc-700 bg-zinc-900 flex items-center justify-center font-mono text-lg shadow-[inset_0_2px_10px_rgba(255,255,255,0.05)] transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1
lottery_balls.chance_1_10: w-12 h-12 rounded-full border-2 border-amber-500 bg-amber-500/10 flex items-center justify-center font-mono text-lg text-amber-500 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(245,158,11,0.2)]

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Use True Grey base (#050507). Cards should be borderless or use a 1px border-white/5. Avoid heavy shadows; use lightness for elevation.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Sticky headers should use backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with a bottom border-white/10.

layouts.dashboard_grid: High-density Bento Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-6. Use col-span-2 for charts, col-span-1 for summary widgets.
layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 inside cards. Section gaps should be py-16 or py-24.
layouts.alignment: Left-align dense data and labels. Center-align empty states and primary CTAs.

components.cards: Flat solid surfaces (#121215) with 1px border (#27272A). Add subtle hover lift (-translate-y-1) for interactive cards like 'Mes grilles'.
components.charts: Use Shadcn chart / Recharts. Dark-first design: bright thin lines, translucent fills (e.g., fill-sky-500/20). Hide grid lines or make them extremely subtle (stroke-white/5).
components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary action uses accent color (e.g., amber for generation) with black text. Secondary actions use surface elevated with white text.
components.generator_controls: Use Shadcn slider or toggle groups for strategy selection (Hot/Cold/Balanced/Random).

motion.transitions: Specific transitions only. transition-transform duration-200 ease-out for hover lifts. transition-colors duration-200 for buttons.
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for bento grid items using Framer Motion.
motion.data_update: Number ticker animations for stats updates if possible.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA/WCAG AA standards against true grey backgrounds.
accessibility.interactive: Include hover and focus states for all interactive elements. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-amber-500 focus:outline-none.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid="generate-grid-button").

images.description: Close-up of futuristic graphs and data analytics. Use as a heavily darkened hero background image on the landing page (bg-black/80 overlay).
Abstract white spheres floating. Use as a subtle decorative background in the 'Générateur de grilles' section with very low opacity (opacity-10).

3d_libraries.charts: Recharts (via Shadcn ui). Use for Frequency Bar Charts, Delay Area Charts.
3d_libraries.heatmap: Custom grid using Tailwind or Recharts ScatterChart to show pair frequencies.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a Next.js/React app with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI.
Create a landing page with a hero section using the provided analytics image with a dark overlay, and a 'Connexion Google' button.
Implement the Dashboard with progressive disclosure: North Star metrics at top, detailed charts below.
Build 'Historique des tirages' view: A table displaying dates, 5 main numbers, and 1 chance number.
Build 'Statistiques' view: Bar charts for frequencies, a heatmap for pairs, and delay metrics. Use Recharts with bright lines and dark backgrounds.
Build 'Numéros chauds/froids' view: Render the lottery balls using the exact Tailwind classes defined in visual_enhancers.lottery_balls.
Build 'Générateur de grilles' view: Include strategy selectors and a prominent generate button. Render the generated grids clearly.
Build 'Mes grilles' view: Display saved grids as bento cards with generation date and strategy used.
Mock the authentication (Emergent Auth) and CSV import logic for now, but provide the UI for them.
Include a 'Générer données de démo 3 ans' button that populates mock data.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and lightness (not shadows in dark mode).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons. Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
DO NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it. Example: Dropdown with transparent background.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
